overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long BBAI Daily ETF (BAIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BBAI), less fees and expenses, through derivatives such as swap agreements. BAIG was launched on Aug 21, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
